summary: Created a 32-component, production-grade Azure healthcare SaaS architecture JSON for MedSecure Healthcare SaaS v2.0.0 with 42 connections, 5 trust boundaries, 7 PHI data flows, and 5 compliance zones (HIPAA-BAA, SOC2-Type-II, HITRUST-CSF, HL7-FHIR-R4). JSON is valid and matches the reference ecommerce-aws format exactly.
